modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble accessing a specific course in D2L.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to get into a specific course in D2L, but I just couldn't figure it out. I mean, I clicked around and nothing seemed to work. It's kinda frustrating when you know the course is there, but you just can't access it. Anyone else had this issue?
short_description: Trouble accessing a specific course in D2L.
